claim_boundary: Read-only post-hoc development diagnostic of OPEN_TRAIN/OPEN_DEVELOPMENT V4-D native-reference overlay failures only. This is not a V4-D pass, Docking Gold, binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, teacher authority, model authority, or recovery authorization.

causal_chain: The normalized 8X6B PVRIG chain T has an internal residue-number break from 51 to 57, so residues 41-51 form a disconnected 11-residue coordinate fragment.
A confirmed severe OPEN-only pose is intact and has all 103 expected unique T-chain CA positions, but flexref translates the 41-51 fragment hundreds of angstroms away from the remaining receptor.
The exact rigidbody precursor is geometrically normal; the break first appears in the exact flexref output and persists through emref and the selected final pose.
The score_pose.py Kabsch overlay uses T-chain CA atoms paired by residue number over the complete common set, so the displaced intact fragment legitimately produces a huge whole-receptor RMSD.
9E6Y lacks the 51-to-57 break and has only ten mild 1.02-1.34 A outliers, consistent with the observed strong conformation asymmetry.

confirmed_severe_open_example.selected_pose_rank_note: This is selected pose index 10 and the worst-score late model in the inspected job; it is not asserted here as the independently replayed helper-sort rank for all 99 rows.
confirmed_severe_open_example.direct_observation: T41-T51 are near x=-483 A while T57-T152 remain near the normal receptor coordinate frame; the local peptide geometry within each fragment remains ordinary, but their relative placement is broken.

second_confirmed_late_bad_example.interpretation: another late, high-score, geometrically failed 8X6B model; included as corroborating evidence supplied during the same audit

complete_now: All 99 exact outlier identities, selected pose indices, RMSD values, conformation and seed are frozen in the bound v2 diagnostic.
The v2 diagnostic proves that exclusion at the unchanged 1.0 A validity rule leaves at least four complete model pairs in every affected job.
not_completed_before_freeze_deadline: Independent helper-sort rank replay and native HADDOCK/AIR extraction for every one of the 99 rows.
All-99 per-residue residual tables and matched-valid-pose structural tables.
Counterfactual rank-weighted utility deltas for retain-invalid versus exclude-invalid.
rank_and_utility_scope.interpretation_limit: The selected pose index distribution must not be relabeled as helper-sort rank. No utility or teacher value is inferred from the incomplete optional replay.

access_boundary.disclosure: An initial protocol-source discovery command enumerated top-level result filenames without opening metric payloads; therefore this artifact makes only the explicit zero raw-run, zero pose-file and zero metric-read claims above, not a blanket zero-filename-enumeration claim.

decision_relevance: The huge 8X6B failures are pose-level technical-invalidity events caused by flexref acting on a disconnected receptor fragment, rather than evidence that the candidate sequence itself has a 100-160 A receptor deformation. Any future handling must be preregistered in a new version; this diagnostic itself does not authorize a mask or modify the frozen 1.0 A gate.
